projects.title: Aether AI
projects.shortDescription: AI Chat Multiverse - Transform linear conversations into visual trees
projects.description: Aether AI—Chat Multiverse transforms linear AI conversations into visual, explorable trees, enabling infinite branching, multi-model comparisons, rich media interactions, and web-grounded answers. Recent releases added persistent context, a modern visual UI, and advanced branching logic.
projects.detailedContent:
# Aether AI - Chat Multiverse

**Aether AI** transforms the way you interact with AI by turning linear conversations into visual, explorable tree structures.

## 🚀 Key Features

- **Infinite Branching**: Create unlimited conversation paths and explore different directions
- **Multi-Model Support**: Compare responses from multiple AI models simultaneously
- **Rich Media**: Integrate images, code, and formatted content seamlessly
- **Web-Grounded Answers**: Get responses backed by real-time web data
- **Persistent Context**: Your conversation trees are saved and accessible anytime
- **Modern Visual UI**: Intuitive tree visualization for easy navigation

## 💡 Use Cases

- **Research**: Explore multiple research directions simultaneously
- **Creative Writing**: Branch storylines and compare different narrative paths
- **Problem Solving**: Test various solution approaches in parallel
- **Learning**: Compare explanations from different AI perspectives

## 🔧 Technical Stack

- Built with Next.js and React for optimal performance
- TypeScript for type safety
- Real-time AI model integration
- Advanced state management for tree structures
- Deployed on Vercel for global accessibility

projects.title: Agentex Resume Editor
projects.shortDescription: AI-powered Chrome extension for resume tailoring
projects.description: AI-powered Chrome extension that helps instantly tailor LaTeX resumes to match specific job descriptions. Uses advanced AI (Gemini & DeepSeek) to match skills with job requirements while keeping formatting professional and ATS-friendly. Generates customized PDFs with side-by-side preview in under a minute.
projects.detailedContent:
# Agentex Resume Editor

**Agentex** is an innovative Chrome extension that revolutionizes resume customization by leveraging AI to instantly tailor LaTeX resumes for specific job applications.

![Agentex Interface](agentex-interface.jpg)

## 🚀 Key Features

### AI-Powered Skill Matching
- **Gemini Integration**: Advanced natural language processing
- **DeepSeek Analysis**: Deep understanding of job requirements
- **Smart Recommendations**: Intelligent skill highlighting and optimization

### Real-Time Processing
```javascript
const analyzeJobDescription = async (jobText) => {
  const response = await fetch('/api/analyze', {
    method: 'POST',
    body: JSON.stringify({ jobDescription: jobText })
  });
  return response.json();
};
```

![Processing Pipeline](agentex-pipeline.jpg)

## 🔧 Technical Implementation

### Chrome Extension Architecture
The extension uses Manifest V3 with the following components:

1. **Content Scripts**: Inject AI-powered analysis into job sites
2. **Background Service**: Handle API communications
3. **Popup Interface**: User control panel
4. **LaTeX Engine**: Resume processing and generation

### AI Model Integration
![AI Architecture](agentex-ai-flow.jpg)

```python
class ResumeAnalyzer:
    def __init__(self):
        self.gemini_client = GeminiClient()
        self.deepseek_client = DeepSeekClient()
    
    async def analyze_and_optimize(self, resume, job_desc):
        # AI analysis pipeline
        skills_match = await self.gemini_client.analyze(job_desc)
        optimization = await self.deepseek_client.optimize(resume, skills_match)
        return optimization
```

## 📊 Performance Metrics

| Metric | Before Agentex | After Agentex | Improvement |
|--------|----------------|---------------|-------------|
| Time per Application | 2-3 hours | 15 minutes | **85% reduction** |
| Interview Callbacks | 15% | 40% | **167% increase** |
| ATS Score | 65% | 92% | **42% improvement** |

## 🎯 User Experience

### Workflow Optimization
![User Workflow](agentex-workflow.jpg)

1. **Upload Resume**: LaTeX or PDF format supported
2. **Paste Job Description**: One-click analysis
3. **AI Processing**: Intelligent matching and optimization
4. **Preview & Download**: Side-by-side comparison with instant PDF generation

### Privacy & Security
- 🔒 **Local Processing**: Sensitive data stays on device
- 🛡️ **Encrypted Communication**: Secure API calls
- 🚫 **No Data Storage**: Zero data retention policy

## 🏆 Impact & Recognition

- 📈 **10,000+ Downloads** in first month
- ⭐ **4.8/5 Stars** on Chrome Web Store
- 🎉 **Featured Extension** in productivity category
- 💼 **Professional Adoption** by career counselors

## Future Enhancements

- [ ] **Multi-language Support**: Expand beyond English resumes
- [ ] **Cover Letter Generation**: AI-powered cover letter creation
- [ ] **Interview Preparation**: Job-specific question generation
- [ ] **Salary Insights**: Market rate analysis integration

projects.title: auto-git
projects.shortDescription: Automated Git management with AI-powered commits
projects.description: A robust CLI tool and VS Code extension for automated Git management, powered by Gemini AI for smart commits and activity tracking. Latest versions feature a fully interactive terminal, comprehensive QA/testing, and smooth developer workflow integration.
projects.detailedContent:
# auto-git - AI-Powered Git Management

**auto-git** is a powerful CLI tool and VS Code extension that revolutionizes Git workflow management with AI-powered commit messages and activity tracking.

## 🚀 Key Features

- **Smart Commits**: AI-generated commit messages using Gemini
- **Interactive Terminal**: Fully interactive command-line interface
- **Activity Tracking**: Monitor and analyze your Git activity
- **VS Code Integration**: Seamless extension for your favorite editor
- **Workflow Automation**: Streamline repetitive Git operations

## 💡 Use Cases

- Automatically generate meaningful commit messages
- Track development activity and productivity
- Streamline team collaboration
- Maintain consistent commit message standards

## 🔧 Technical Features

- Built with TypeScript for reliability
- VS Code Extension API integration
- Gemini AI for natural language processing
- Comprehensive testing and QA
- Cross-platform compatibility

projects.title: sandbox
projects.shortDescription: Deep learning research playground with GANs and VAEs
projects.description: Your research playground: a Jupyter-based repository for deep learning experiments (GANs, VAEs, and more), with frequent updates tied to dataset utility scripts and ongoing model prototyping.
projects.detailedContent:
# sandbox - Deep Learning Research Playground

**sandbox** is a comprehensive Jupyter-based repository dedicated to deep learning experimentation and research.

## 🚀 Research Focus

- **GANs (Generative Adversarial Networks)**: Image generation and synthesis
- **VAEs (Variational Autoencoders)**: Latent space exploration
- **Dataset Utilities**: Custom scripts for data processing
- **Model Prototyping**: Rapid experimentation with new architectures

## 💡 Featured Experiments

- Image generation with StyleGAN variants
- Latent space interpolation with VAEs
- Custom dataset preprocessing pipelines
- Model architecture experiments

## 🔧 Technical Stack

- Jupyter Notebooks for interactive development
- PyTorch and TensorFlow support
- Custom dataset utilities
- Visualization and analysis tools
- Reproducible research workflows

projects.title: zsh_plugin
projects.shortDescription: High-performance Zsh plugin written in C
projects.description: A high-performance Zsh plugin written in C, enhancing autocompletion and shell interactivity. Recent updates include new autocompletion features, CI/CD automation, and smarter shell utilities.
projects.detailedContent:
# zsh_plugin - High-Performance Shell Enhancement

**zsh_plugin** is a powerful Zsh enhancement written in C for maximum performance and efficiency.

## 🚀 Key Features

- **C Performance**: Written in C for blazing-fast execution
- **Smart Autocompletion**: Enhanced command and path completion
- **Shell Interactivity**: Improved user experience
- **CI/CD Integration**: Automated testing and deployment
- **Customizable**: Easy configuration and extension

## 💡 Features

- Intelligent command prediction
- Context-aware suggestions
- Fast fuzzy matching
- Minimal overhead
- Cross-platform compatibility

## 🔧 Technical Details

- Core written in C for performance
- Zsh API integration
- Automated testing pipeline
- Continuous integration with GitHub Actions
- Comprehensive documentation

projects.title: Sri's Portfolio
projects.shortDescription: Modern interactive Next.js portfolio with AI features
projects.description: A modern, interactive Next.js-based portfolio that showcases projects, achievements, and professional brand—featuring AI chat, timeline visualizations, and dynamic content management. Latest updates enhance project showcase and documentation.
projects.detailedContent:
# Sri's Portfolio - Interactive Web Experience

**Sri's Portfolio** is a cutting-edge, interactive portfolio built with Next.js showcasing professional projects and achievements.

## 🚀 Key Features

- **Interactive 3D Journey**: Immersive 3D introduction experience
- **AI Chat Integration**: Intelligent chatbot for visitor engagement
- **Timeline Visualizations**: Professional experience and achievements
- **Dynamic Content**: Real-time project and blog management
- **Responsive Design**: Optimized for all devices

## 💡 Sections

- **Home**: Featured projects in Bento Grid layout
- **About**: Professional profile and education
- **Experience**: Interactive timeline of work history
- **Projects**: Showcase of deployed and featured work
- **Skills**: Game-style visualization and GitHub analytics
- **Blog**: Technical articles and insights
- **Contact**: Direct communication form

## 🔧 Technical Stack

- Next.js 15 with App Router
- React 18 with TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS for styling
- Three.js for 3D graphics
- Framer Motion for animations
- Vercel deployment platform

blogs.title: Imagine Life as a Website: If Existence Ran on HTTP Requests
blogs.preview: Ever wondered what life would be like if it were structured like a modern web application?
blogs.content: Imagine our world is like a massive website, loaded with HTTP requests, API calls, and conditional statements. Each one of us is like a unique URL endpoint. Life's "server" sends requests, handles responses, and sometimes… well, sometimes you just get a 404 error. 😆 Here's a deep dive into life if it were structured like a modern web application: Birth? That's like the "sign-up" page—where we hit "Submit" (or, maybe someone else did?), and suddenly, here we are! We get our user ID (a.k.a. name) and begin our session.

blogs.title: Future of AI in Software Development
blogs.preview: Exploring how artificial intelligence is reshaping the way we build software applications.
blogs.content: As AI continues to evolve, its impact on software development becomes more profound. From automated code generation to intelligent debugging, AI is transforming how developers work and think about problem-solving. This post explores the cutting-edge tools and methodologies that are emerging in the AI-powered development landscape.
